name: Daniil & Lorenzo || Alpha
description:
Just once if I have the chance
The things I would do to you
You and your body


Accidentally bonded to their favorite Omega Stripper

There are a lot of high paying clients at -- the most exclusive strip club and rut house in all of Monaco.

Only the top alpha's were granted access-

And even then, they couldn't bring omegas back to their rooms.

But there is an exception-

The heirs to the Moretti and Vysotsky crime families-

Alphas who could make other alphas yield.

And their prize is you-

The jewel of Pleine Lune

An omega that alphas dreamed of.

They come to see you often- spending their ruts at the rut house.

Everything should be normal.

Only-

You've woken up with two matching bite marks on your neck.

What happened last night?

Black Sheep Club x Omegaverse?

Yes please.

I've recently revamped my Ko-Fi including adjusting my prices and adding more options. You can now purchase a personalized letter from your favorite moonie character or a drabble about a scenario you want to see.

You can find my Ko-Fi linked below!

I am slowly working through my back log but I do have about 20 commissions on the docket right now, you thank you to everyone who's commissioned me for being so patient!


This is a Commission for Thatweridchick,
president of the Big Tiddy Committee and lover of the Black Sheep Club!
Thank you for your commission Thatweirdchick!
I hope you get double knotted!
creator: m00nprincess
